name: rank32_steps600
hypothesis: the format plateau is a state-CAPACITY ceiling, not retention or optimization (both prior break attempts diverged with no gain): a rank-16 Kronecker-residual state is too low-rank to disentangle 4 key->value bindings, so doubling residual_rank to 32 at the proven-stable baseline (lr 2.5e-4, decay_clamp 0.999, slow_decay 0.97) + 600 steps lets true retrieval emerge past ~0.30.
